Our Story

Where Every Meal Becomes a Memory

Vrindaa By Agrawals is Mandsaur's premier fine-dining destination — a sanctuary where aesthetic interiors meet soulful cuisine. Nestled in peaceful surroundings on Rewas Dewda Road, our restaurant is designed to be your escape from the ordinary.

From the warm glow of our ambient lighting to the carefully curated menu featuring both classic and contemporary Indian dishes, every detail at Vrindaa is crafted to create an experience that lingers long after the last bite.

Culinary Excellence

Our Menu

Carefully crafted dishes that celebrate the richness of Indian culinary heritage with a modern, refined touch.

Popular
Paneer Tikka
Marinated cottage cheese cubes grilled in our tandoor with bell peppers and spiced yoghurt.

Steamed Dimsum
Delicate handmade dumplings filled with spiced vegetables, served with chilli-garlic dipping sauce.

Tandoori Pizza
Indian-fusion thin-crust pizza with tandoori paneer, onions, and aromatic masala sauce.
₹320
🍛
Bestseller
Shahi Paneer
Rich cottage cheese in a royal cashew-cream gravy, subtly spiced with saffron and cardamom.
₹340
🫕
Dal Makhani
Slow-cooked overnight black lentils in a velvety butter and cream sauce. A timeless classic.
₹260
🍚

Vegetable Biryani
Fragrant basmati rice layered with seasonal vegetables, whole spices, and caramelised onions.
₹300

Rabdi Jalebi
Crispy golden jalebis paired with thick, creamy rabdi — the ultimate Indian dessert pairing.
₹180

Gulab Jamun

₹160
🍨
Kulfi Falooda

₹200

Rose Thandai
A chilled milk drink infused with rose, saffron, almonds, and aromatic spices — royally refreshing.
₹140

Masala Chai

Guest Experiences

What Our Guests Say

★★★★★

"Amazing food and great ambience! The paneer tikka and dimsum were absolutely outstanding. The interior is so beautifully decorated — felt like a premium experience at a very reasonable price."

★★★★★

"Peaceful and aesthetic vibe — exactly what you need after a long day. The live music in the evenings is a lovely touch. Staff is very courteous. Will definitely bring my family again!"
